message:
feat(dedup): add DeduplicationSummary and Personalization Engine foundation

- Add DeduplicationSummary struct for aggregating scan results
  - Tracks total skills, duplicate pairs, breakdown by recommendation
- Add Personalization Engine types:
  - StyleProfile for user coding preferences
  - CodePattern, NamingConvention, CommentStyle types
  - CaseStyle enum (snake_case, camelCase, etc.)
  - LanguagePrefs for language-specific settings
  - Personalizer struct with placeholder implementation
  - PersonalizedSkill result type
- Add comprehensive tests for new types

Part of meta_skill-s8z: Skill Deduplication & Personalization Engine

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
